use_cases: Product cards for e-commerce showcasing front and back images
Portfolio gallery with interactive image reveals
Team member cards displaying information on flip
Interactive media cards for creative portfolios
ai_summary: A 3D flip card component that rotates on hover to reveal back content, featuring smooth rotateY transitions with 700ms timing and translateY offset for depth. The card accepts a single imageUrl prop and displays it on both front and back faces with a solid blue back side. Uses CSS perspective, backface-visibility, and transform-style for authentic 3D effects suitable for product showcases and interactive galleries.
